task_completion.description: Verify a traffic stop call was created at the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an active or created call in the CAD Console with the call type '10-38' (or Traffic Stop) located at 'Forum Drive' and 'Strawberry Avenue'.

task_completion.description: Verify the call narrative includes the required incident circumstances.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for call notes or narrative text mentioning the vehicle (Bravado Buffalo, plate 63JIG803) and the fleeing passenger.

task_completion.description: Verify a formal citation was issued to Franklin Clinton for Running Red Light.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a citation form, record, or success message showing the name 'Franklin Clinton' and the offense/charge 'Running Red Light'.

task_completion.description: Verify the citation includes the correct fine amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the specific fine amount of '$175.00' associated with the 'Running Red Light' citation for Franklin Clinton.

task_completion.description: Verify a person BOLO was filed for the fleeing passenger.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a BOLO (Be On the Lookout) submission or active record for a person matching the description: Black male, athletic build, gray hoodie, dark jeans.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the OpenCAD web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the OpenCAD system at http://localhost, not terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual CAD application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Data should be entered into the OpenCAD input fields (Call creation, Citation, BOLO forms), rather than just typed into a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open running SQL commands or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) used to insert the records directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Call Type: 10-38 (Traffic Stop). Expected Location: Forum Drive and Strawberry Avenue. Expected Citation Person: Franklin Clinton (NCIC ID: 2). Expected Citation Offense: Running Red Light. Expected Fine: $175.00. The BOLO must be for a person matching the passenger's description.
